# Feature 002: Web Teaching Sidebar

## Status

Planned.

## Goal

Render the existing teaching event stream in the browser, including skills,
tools, shell commands, files, context, safety, course progress, and exports.

## Planned Artifacts

- `spec.md`: Browser sidebar behavior and event mapping.
- `plan.md`: Implementation architecture and sequencing.
- `tasks.md`: Executable task list.

## Relationship To Other Features

This feature turns the Phase 1 terminal teaching sidebar into a reusable visual
surface for the Web platform. Superpowers should use this surface to show skill
installation, verification, and activation.
